description: Sector overlay for French petroleum exploration, production, storage, pipelines, downstream facilities, decommissioning, safety, environmental, and hydrocarbons documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Oil and Gas. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Hydrocarbon resources of France and mining-code framework
Installations Classées pour la Protection de l’Environnement (ICPE)

rules.title: Hydrocarbon mining title, exploration permit, or concession evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for hydrocarbons, mining title, exclusive research permit, concession, authorization of works, or mining-code evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Environmental authorization, emissions, or pollution-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for environmental authorization, ICPE, IED, emissions, water/soil protection, pollution control, or site rehabilitation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: HSE, technological-risk, or emergency-response evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for HSE, safety case, emergency plan, Seveso, pipeline safety, hazardous substance, or accident-prevention evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Closure, decommissioning, well security, or rehabilitation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for decommissioning, field closure, well security, dismantling, cleanup, rehabilitation, or cessation evidence.
